title: Banned from Broadcast: Saiko! The Large Family
original_title: 放送禁止 劇場版 ～ニッポンの大家族 Saiko! The Large family
overview: Canadian filmmaker Veronica Addison, who makes documentaries on family issues around the world, closely follows a very large family in Japan. Although they appear cheerful on the surface, the family has many problems...
